changes: Added module-level pendingAmbientType: AmbientType | null = null
startAmbient(): when ctx.state === 'suspended', sets pendingAmbientType = type and returns (instead of silent drop)
resumeOnInteraction(): after ctx.resume() resolves, if pendingAmbientType !== null and ambientSession === null, calls startAmbient(pendingAmbientType) — then clears queue
Fix ensures menu ambient (55Hz drone) plays as soon as user clicks or presses a key, even if boot screen auto-dismissed before interaction

T070_hud_faction_bars.finding: Faction bars are fully implemented: buildFactionPanel() creates 5 rows (label+80px track+fill+value), initHUD() calls buildFactionPanel() + store.subscribe(updateHUD), updateHUD() iterates FACTIONS and sets faction-fill-{faction} width + faction-val-{faction} text. Logic is correct.
T070_hud_faction_bars.enhancement: Upgraded FACTION_COLORS from dim palette to vivid spec from backlog: druides=#6abf69 anciens=#e8c84c korrigans=#b888e8 niamh=#8ab4f8 ankou=#e05c5c. Makes bars visually readable at low rep values.
